Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.state AS state, bs."in.county_name" AS county_name, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.bldg_id = 51037 GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/b6253f756c6e5bc2b0f9abcb1585eb736c0f761a1218a45384564010b495be64/3ae83f51-d649-4336-8d63-eb1d8756c8d0/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
